TC-6.2.finding: Sessions API returns all 42 sessions in single 9993-byte payload. pagination_class=None. For 3000 concurrent users with 50+ sessions each, this creates severe scalability risk.

TC-7.3.finding: Zustand state is per-tab. No BroadcastChannel or cross-tab sync. Each tab has independent session list and chat state.
